nodes.title: OpenSpec: memory-namespace-browser
nodes.description: Execution tracker for openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser. Ruflo memory namespace browser: new Tauri commands, IPC bindings, and React UI for browsing/searching/managing Ruflo AgentDB memory entries from within BeadSpec.

nodes.title: 1.1: Create ruflo_memory.rs with MemoryEntry and MemoryListResponse structs
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §1.1. Create `src-tauri/src/commands/ruflo_memory.rs`. Define structs `MemoryEntry { key: String, score: f32, namespace: String, preview: String, body: String, ts: Option<i64> }` and `MemoryListResponse { entries: Vec<MemoryEntry>, total: u32 }`, both deriving `serde::Serialize`, `serde::Deserialize`, and `specta::Type`.

nodes.title: 1.2: Add is_valid_memory_key validator
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §1.2. Add a private validator `is_valid_memory_key(key: &str) -> bool`: non-empty, ≤ 1024 chars, characters drawn from `[A-Za-z0-9:|=._/-]`. Reject any other byte to keep the value out of shell-injection paths.

nodes.title: 1.3: Add is_valid_memory_value validator
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §1.3. Add a private validator `is_valid_memory_value(value: &str) -> bool`: non-empty, ≤ 65536 bytes (64 KiB). No character restriction (value is passed as a single argv element, not via shell).

nodes.title: 1.4: Make find_ruflo_with_override and run_ruflo_managed pub(crate) in external.rs
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §1.4. Reuse `find_ruflo_with_override` and `run_ruflo_managed` from `external.rs` by making them `pub(crate)` if not already; do not duplicate them.

nodes.title: 2.1: Add ruflo_memory_list Tauri command
nodes.description:
openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §2.1. Add `ruflo_memory_list(namespace_prefix: Option, limit: Option, settings: State<'_, Arc>>) -> Result`. Build argv `["memory", "list", "--format", "json"]`, append `["--prefix",

]` if `namespace_prefix` is `Some(non-empty)`, append `["--limit", ]` (default 500 if `None`). Parse stdout as JSON into `MemoryListResponse`. 10 s timeout.

nodes.title: 2.2: Add ruflo_memory_store Tauri command
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §2.2. Add `ruflo_memory_store(key: String, value: String, settings: …) -> Result<(), String>`. Validate `key` and `value`. Build argv `["memory", "store", "-k", <key>, "-v", <value>]`. 10 s timeout. Returns `Ok(())` on exit 0, `Err(stderr)` otherwise.

nodes.title: 2.3: Add ruflo_memory_delete Tauri command
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §2.3. Add `ruflo_memory_delete(key: String, settings: …) -> Result<(), String>`. Validate `key`. Build argv `["memory", "delete", "-k", <key>]`. 10 s timeout. Same return contract as `store`.

nodes.title: 2.4: Register ruflo_memory module in commands/mod.rs
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §2.4. Register the new module in `src-tauri/src/commands/mod.rs` as `pub mod ruflo_memory;`.

nodes.title: 2.5: Register the three commands in lib.rs handler and specta collector
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §2.5. Register the three commands in `src-tauri/src/lib.rs` inside `tauri::generate_handler!` and `tauri_specta::collect_commands!`, adjacent to `ruflo_memory_search` and `ruflo_version_probe`.

nodes.title: 3.1: Unit test is_valid_memory_key
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §3.1. Unit test `is_valid_memory_key`: accepts canonical examples (`branch:foo|repo:bar|type:note`, `openspec:abc-def|issue:BEADSPEC-xqf|type:trajectory|ts:1700000000`); rejects shell metacharacters (`;`, `$`, `` ` ``, spaces, newlines, empty string, and an over-long input).

nodes.title: 3.2: Unit test is_valid_memory_value
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §3.2. Unit test `is_valid_memory_value`: accepts a small string, accepts a 64 KiB string, rejects empty, rejects 65537-byte string.

nodes.title: 3.3: Unit test ruflo_memory_list argv construction with prefix and limit
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §3.3. Unit test that the argv constructed by `ruflo_memory_list` is exactly `["memory","list","--format","json","--prefix","branch:foo","--limit","250"]` when `namespace_prefix=Some("branch:foo")` and `limit=Some(250)`. Extract argv construction into a pure helper if needed to test without spawning.

nodes.title: 3.4: Unit test ruflo_memory_list with None prefix omits --prefix and defaults limit to 500
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §3.4. Unit test that `ruflo_memory_list` with `None` prefix omits `--prefix` and defaults limit to 500.

nodes.title: 3.5: Unit test ruflo_memory_store rejects invalid keys before spawn
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §3.5. Unit test that `ruflo_memory_store` rejects a key containing `;`, `$`, or a newline before any spawn happens.

nodes.title: 3.6: Unit test ruflo_memory_delete rejects empty key before spawn
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §3.6. Unit test that `ruflo_memory_delete` rejects an empty key before any spawn happens.

nodes.title: 4.1: Regenerate src/bindings.ts with new memory commands and types
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §4.1. Run `bun tauri build` (or the existing `specta` codegen script) to regenerate `src/bindings.ts` with `MemoryEntry`, `MemoryListResponse`, `rufloMemoryList`, `rufloMemoryStore`, `rufloMemoryDelete`.

nodes.title: 4.2: Add IPC wrappers to src/ipc.ts for memory commands
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §4.2. Add wrappers to `src/ipc.ts`: `rufloMemoryList(prefix?: string, limit?: number): Promise<MemoryListResponse>`, `rufloMemoryStore(key: string, value: string): Promise<void>`, `rufloMemoryDelete(key: string): Promise<void>`.

nodes.title: 5.1: Create parseMemoryKey.ts helper
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §5.1. Create `src/components/memory-browser/parseMemoryKey.ts` exporting `parseMemoryKey(key: string): MemoryFacets`. Implements "split on first colon" per the project label-parsing rule.

nodes.title: 5.2: Vitest for parseMemoryKey
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §5.2. Vitest covering: canonical key parses into all known facets; unknown facets land in `rest`; missing `|` returns `{ rest: {}, raw }`; numeric `ts:` parses into `ts: number`; non-numeric `ts:` parses into `rest.ts` string and leaves `ts` undefined.

nodes.title: 5.3: Create useRufloAvailable hook
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §5.3. Create `src/components/memory-browser/useRufloAvailable.ts` hook that lazily probes `commands.rufloVersionProbe`, memoises the boolean result per app session, and returns `{ available, loading }`.

nodes.title: 6.1: Create MemoryBrowser.tsx container component
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §6.1. Create `src/components/memory-browser/MemoryBrowser.tsx`: container layout (top toolbar, left rail, right pane, optional drawer). TanStack Query keys `['ruflo-memory','list', prefix]` and `['ruflo-memory','search', query]`.

nodes.title: 6.2: Create NamespaceTree.tsx left-rail tree component
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §6.2. Create `NamespaceTree.tsx`: builds a tree from `MemoryListResponse.entries` via `parseMemoryKey` and the canonical hierarchy. Collapsible nodes via local `useState<Set<string>>` of expanded paths. Each node shows count. Bucket unparseable keys under `(unparsed)`.

nodes.title: 6.3: Create MemoryList.tsx right-pane row list component
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §6.3. Create `MemoryList.tsx`: renders the right-pane rows. Columns key·score·timestamp·preview. Sort by `ts` desc (entries without `ts` sink to the bottom). Per-row delete icon (opens confirm dialog).

nodes.title: 6.4: Create MemoryDetailDrawer.tsx detail pane component
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §6.4. Create `MemoryDetailDrawer.tsx`: shows raw key (copyable), parsed facet chips, full body, score (search mode only), Open-issue button (when `facets.issue` set), Delete button.

nodes.title: 6.5: Create StoreEntryDialog.tsx form dialog component
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §6.5. Create `StoreEntryDialog.tsx`: form with key (pre-filled from selected namespace) + value + Store/Cancel. Client-side validation mirrors backend.

nodes.title: 6.6: Wire Open in Memory browser link in RufloMemoryPanel.tsx
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §6.6. Wire a small "Open in Memory browser" link in `RufloMemoryPanel.tsx` that calls `setState({ view: 'memory', memoryNamespace: <prefix derived from taskId+labels> })`. The browser reads `state.memoryNamespace` on mount and selects that node.

nodes.title: 6.7: Add per-row Delete confirm dialog to MemoryList
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §6.7. Add a per-row Delete confirm dialog (re-use existing confirm-dialog primitive if one exists; otherwise inline modal). Confirm text shows the full key verbatim.

nodes.title: 7.1: Extend ALL_VIEWS in ViewSwitcher.tsx with Memory entry
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §7.1. Extend `ALL_VIEWS` in `src/components/layout/ViewSwitcher.tsx` with `{ id: 'memory', label: 'Memory', description: 'Ruflo memory browser', feature: 'ruflo' }`; widen the `feature?` type to `'openspec' | 'ruflo'`.

nodes.title: 7.2: AND-gate ruflo-flagged ViewSwitcher entries on useRufloAvailable
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §7.2. Update the filter in `ViewSwitcher` to also AND-gate the `'ruflo'`-flagged entries on `useRufloAvailable().available`.

nodes.title: 7.3: Add redirect effect for memory view when gates flip false
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §7.3. Add a redirect effect mirroring the OpenSpec one: if `activeView === 'memory'` and either gate flips false, `setState({ view: 'all' })`.

nodes.title: 7.4: Mount MemoryBrowser in layout/index.tsx when view === 'memory'
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §7.4. Update `src/components/layout/index.tsx` to mount `<MemoryBrowser />` when `state.view === 'memory'`.

nodes.title: 7.5: Extend hash-state schema to encode view: 'memory'
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §7.5. Extend the hash-state schema to encode `view: 'memory'` (no `memoryNamespace` in the hash for this change — it lives in local UI state to avoid bloating the URL hash).

nodes.title: 8.1: Vitest for parseMemoryKey (frontend test suite)
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §8.1. Vitest for `parseMemoryKey` per task 5.2.

nodes.title: 8.2: Vitest for NamespaceTree.buildTree pure builder
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §8.2. Vitest for `NamespaceTree.buildTree(entries)` (factor pure builder out of the component): canonical entries produce the expected tree shape; unparseable entries land in `(unparsed)`.

nodes.title: 8.3: RTL render MemoryBrowser with mocked rufloMemoryList
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §8.3. React Testing Library: render `MemoryBrowser` with a mocked `rufloMemoryList` returning three entries across two namespaces; assert tree shows both branches, list shows all three entries sorted by `ts` desc, breadcrumb defaults to root.

nodes.title: 8.4: RTL namespace node click filters list and updates breadcrumb
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §8.4. RTL: click a namespace node, assert the list filters and the breadcrumb updates.

nodes.title: 8.5: RTL search input triggers rufloMemorySearch and swaps to search-mode
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §8.5. RTL: type in the search input, submit; assert `rufloMemorySearch` is called and list-mode swaps to search-mode (breadcrumb shows `Search: "<q>"`).

nodes.title: 8.6: RTL row click mounts MemoryDetailDrawer and Open issue navigates
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §8.6. RTL: click a row, assert `MemoryDetailDrawer` mounts; click "Open issue", assert `setState` invoked with `{ view: 'all', taskId: <id> }`.

nodes.title: 8.7: RTL delete from drawer calls rufloMemoryDelete and invalidates query
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §8.7. RTL: click Delete in the drawer, confirm, assert `rufloMemoryDelete` called and the query is invalidated.

nodes.title: 8.8: RTL Store dialog calls rufloMemoryStore and invalidates list query
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §8.8. RTL: click + Store, fill the form, submit, assert `rufloMemoryStore` called with the composed key and that the list query is invalidated.

nodes.title: 8.9: RTL Memory view button absent when Ruflo flag disabled
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §8.9. RTL: with Ruflo flag disabled, the Memory view button is absent from `ViewSwitcher`.

nodes.title: 8.10: RTL Memory view button absent when Ruflo flag on but useRufloAvailable returns false
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §8.10. RTL: with Ruflo flag enabled but `useRufloAvailable().available === false`, the Memory view button is absent.

nodes.title: 9.1: cargo test -p beadspec_lib ruflo_memory:: passes
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §9.1. `cargo test -p beadspec_lib ruflo_memory::` passes.

nodes.title: 9.2: bun tsc --noEmit passes after bindings regen
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §9.2. `bun tsc --noEmit` passes after bindings regen.

nodes.title: 9.3: bun test passes (Vitest + RTL suites)
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §9.3. `bun test` passes (Vitest + RTL suites).

nodes.title: 9.4: Manual: launch bun tauri dev and verify memory tree populates and filters
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §9.4. Manual: with `ruflo` installed and the feature flag on, launch `bun tauri dev`, switch to Memory, confirm the tree populates, click a namespace, observe entries filter, search for a token, observe results swap.

nodes.title: 9.5: Manual: store and delete an entry in the memory browser
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §9.5. Manual: + Store a new entry under the currently selected namespace, observe it appear in the list within one query cycle; delete it, observe it disappear.

nodes.title: 9.6: Manual: open entry with issue facet and confirm TaskDetailPanel navigates
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §9.6. Manual: open an entry whose key includes `issue:<id>`; click Open issue; confirm `TaskDetailPanel` opens on that issue.

nodes.title: 9.7: Manual: turn Ruflo flag off while on Memory view redirects to All
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §9.7. Manual: turn the Ruflo flag off in Settings while on the Memory view; confirm the view redirects to All and the nav entry disappears.

nodes.title: 9.8: Manual: Memory view button hidden when ruflo missing from PATH
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §9.8. Manual: with `ruflo` missing from PATH, confirm the Memory view button is hidden even with the flag on.

nodes.title: 9.9: openspec validate memory-namespace-browser passes
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-namespace-browser/tasks.md §9.9. `openspec validate memory-namespace-browser` passes.
